# Capable Kid — Life Skills Toolkit

## About
Capable Kid is a printable life-skills toolkit for parents of children ages 4–18. It helps families teach everyday independence — one small skill per week — using a simple, repeatable system of challenge cards, age checklists, trackers, and parent scripts.

## Product
- Name: The Capable Kid — Life Skills Toolkit
- Format: Printable PDF (62 pages)
- Price: $19 one-time
- Ages: 4–18
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Website: https://thecapablekid.com
- Spanish: https://thecapablekid.com/spanish

## What's Inside
- 68 challenge cards (52 weekly + 16 bonus) across 9 skill areas
- 5 age checklists covering ages 4–6, 7–9, 10–12, 13–15, and 16–18
- 9 skill-area guides: Home, Food & Kitchen, Personal Care, Communication, Money & Shopping, Safety & Travel, Responsibility, Digital & Work, Getting Along & Feelings
- Done-for-you 12-week starter plan
- Weekly, 12-week, and 52-week progress trackers
- Parent scripts with exact words for real situations
- Money jars (Save · Spend · Give), chore chart, conversation starters
- Reward coupons, "I Did It!" badges, and a certificate of progress
- Print & assemble guide

## Method
Each challenge card uses a four-step coaching method:
1. Watch me — parent models the skill
2. With me — child does it alongside parent
3. You try — child leads with minimal help
4. On your own — child does it solo and earns a star

## Skill Areas
Home Care, Food & Kitchen, Personal Care & Health, Communication & Manners, Money & Shopping, Safety Travel & Emergencies, Responsibility & Community, Digital School & Work, Getting Along & Feelings

## Free Resources
- 5-Card Sampler: a free printable with five challenge cards
- Getting Along Deck: 8 free social-emotional challenge cards

## Contact
Website: https://thecapablekid.com
